name: DEGIRO Importer
description: Import account statements from DEGIRO. Supports buys, sells, dividends, taxes, deposits, withdrawals, fees and interest, with explicit symbol review and duplicate-safe imports.
author: shuisman; port maintained by Jacco Broere

permissions.purpose: Register the importer sidebar entry and route, then release addon state on disable
Read accounts so the user can select the import destination
Validate and import DEGIRO activities, detect prior imports, and persist ISIN-to-symbol mappings
Resolve ISINs to exchange instruments during the explicit symbol mapping step
